narrative:
Beaver Village (precinct in Pike County) has 229 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.0 percentage points.
